reference_answer: Intake aide Mara Chen received referral R-44.
CI-44 was filed with status pending triage.
CI-44 was routed to orthopedic review.
Immediate scheduling was denied because the referral lacked a mobility score.
Pending nurse review superseded the denied scheduling status after mobility score MS-9 was added.
The patient withdrew the request for a morning-only appointment window.
CI-44 was reopened to add the scheduling preference note.
